summary: Retest of iteration_65 defects for Admin i18n Phase 2. All 3 previously-reported defects are FIXED and verified in both EN and ES. Regression checks on phase-1 pages and language persistence also pass.

HIGH_revenue_en_i18n.analytics_dialog_en: PASS — 'Profit per month (last N months)' and 'Comparative revenue statistics' both render in English
HIGH_revenue_en_i18n.es_switch: PASS — 'Ganancia P2P por par', 'Registro Diario', 'Registro Mensual', 'Ganancia del Marketplace' all return in Spanish after localStorage lang switch
HIGH_revenue_en_i18n.note: The single empty-state string 'No months with data yet.' was not in innerText because the monthly table has data rows — this is expected behaviour, not a defect.

LOW_audit_h1.h1_es: Registro de Acciones (present after language switch)

REGRESSION_phase1_pages.notes: All pages render non-blank content. /admin/appeals, /admin/kyc redirect into /admin/users?tab=... hubs as designed.

critical_code_review_comments: All three iter65 fixes are surgical and correct: (a) 6 revenue leaf files now import useTranslation and read from admin.revenue.* keys; (b) /admin/capital-requests route registered as Navigate redirect (AdminPanel.jsx line 230); (c) AdminAuditHub.jsx renders AdminPageHeader before the <nav> tab bar, so the H1 is no longer swallowed by hideMonthly.
No new regressions detected. AdminPageHeader pattern remains consistent across 16 admin views.

Suggestion (non-blocking, follow-up): the review request expected 'no months with data yet' string to be visible; in the current seed data the monthly table has rows so that empty-state never triggers. Consider adding a Playwright/unit test that mounts RevenueMonthlyTable with an empty rows prop to guarantee the empty-state translation stays in sync.

success_rate.frontend: 3/3 defects verified fixed. 16/16 admin pages fully i18n across EN+ES (100%).

test_credentials: Admin: session_token=test_session_admin_X (user_test_admin01 / admin.test@resilience.com). Valid via cookie set before navigation.
seed_data_creation: None — reused existing seeded admin + orders/revenue data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin i18n Phase 2 is now 100% complete. Language storage key is `resilience_lang` in localStorage (values 'en'/'es'). All 16 admin routes translate correctly in both languages including revenue subcomponents (RevenueByPairTable, RevenueDailyTable, RevenueMonthlyTable, RevenueMarketplaceTable, RevenueCards.RoleCard, RevenueAnalyticsDialog). Route /admin/capital-requests redirects to /admin/company-funds?tab=requests. Route /admin/audit renders AdminPageHeader with title above tabs.
rca of the issue: N/A — retest run. All 3 previously reported defects are confirmed fixed.
